about.title: About Rossellini's Italian Cuisine – Best Italian Restaurant in Daytona Beach, FL
about.subtitle: Made in Italy, Imported to Daytona
about.content:
Welcome to Rossellini's Italian Cuisine, your best Italian restaurant near me in Daytona Beach, FL! Located on S Atlantic Ave, steps from the beach, we're the top choice for Italian food near me, restaurants near me, and pasta near me. We serve authentic Italian cuisine — made in Italy, imported to Daytona.

Our pastas are made fresh with traditional recipes, topped with slow-simmered sauces, imported cheeses, and the finest ingredients. Whether you're craving classic spaghetti and meatballs, chicken parmigiana, wood-fired pizza, or fresh seafood, we make it authentic and delicious.

We also serve antipasti, salads, calzones, desserts like tiramisu and cannoli, and daily specials. Perfect for dine-in, takeout, or delivery in Daytona Beach. Looking for the best Italian restaurant near me? You found it!

Authentic recipes. Quality service. Family tradition. Come hungry, leave happy! 🍝
